articles.title: Popular US movie critic Gene Shalit dies aged 100 - BBC
articles.description: The moustachioed reviewer was a popular fixture in American households from the 1970s through to his retirement in 2010.
articles.content: In 2002, his book Great Hollywood Wit was published, an anthology he wrote features a "glorious cavalcade of Hollywood wisecracks, zingers, japes, quips, slings, jests, snappers, & sass from the … [+82 chars]
